title: Odyssey Roles
description: A utility mod adding useful commands and player permission handling
body:
## Prometheus [![Made by Terrarium](https://images.teamresourceful.com/u/I80VLV.svg)](https://discord.terrarium.earth) [![Modrinth Partnership](https://images.teamresourceful.com/u/Bi4Cuo.svg)](https://discord.gg/modrinth-734077874708938864) [![Requires Resourceful Lib](https://images.teamresourceful.com/u/jUWHY2.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourceful-lib) ### 📖 About 📖 Named after the cunning god who stole fire from the gods to give it to humanity and provide them with great resources. Prometheus is a utility mod, granting users access to useful commands and quick utilities, and providing server owners with great control over player permissions, warps and even custom command scripts. ### Player permission management ![Player permission stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iYcNKH7W/images/f749be5a369989a13a6df78e28c65c531bd0fe43.gif) ### Warp screen ![Warp screen for players](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iYcNKH7W/images/e10db99bb3bc759fb0a0c2d16352763710ae9383.png) ### Custom command ![Custom commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iYcNKH7W/images/ca5082bdaee00d022b8c310cd726c86078f4483e.png) ---
### Socials [![youtube-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy-minimal/social/youtube-plural_vector.svg)](https://youtube.terrarium.earth) [![twitch-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy-minimal/social/twitch-plural_vector.svg)](https://www.twitch.tv/terrariumearth) [![twitter-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy-minimal/social/twitter-plural_vector.svg)](https://twitter.terrarium.earth) [![kofi-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy-minimal/donate/kofi-plural_vector.svg)](https://kofi.terrarium.earth) [![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy-minimal/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](https://discord.terrarium.earth) [![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy-minimal/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/user/Terrarium) [![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy-minimal/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/terrariumearth/projects) --- ### Check out our other projects
